steps.title: Identify the role being described
steps.content: The student's goal is to describe the role of refrigerants in freezers. From the notes, the role is clear: refrigerants absorb heat and release cold air.

steps.title: Find the choice that effectively conveys this role
steps.content: Choice D states directly that freezers use refrigerants to absorb heat and release cold air, with a concrete example (fluoromethane). The other three either omit refrigerants entirely (A), focus on chemical composition rather than function (B), or describe the phase-change mechanism instead of the actual role (C). That matches choice D — D is correct.
